other_observers: Steve Silva found the bird. It was observed once dead by Rose Brinks, Ken and Sandy Ecton, Nick Komar, Nick A. Komar, Eric DeFonso.; I am not the finder or identifier of this bird. Bird was identified by Ken Ecton.
specific_location: 4 houses down from 1425 Beech Court, near intersection of Vine St and Shields St
description: Small alcid, 8 inches in length (measured when dead). Black cap and auricular extending to upper throat, wings, tail. Gray back, nape. Some gray on upper sides and lower flanks. White below. Short, pale bill. Upper mandible curved downward. Gray legs.Behaviors: Bird was observed waddling on residential street. Picked up and placed in bathtub overnight where it died.Call: not heardPlumage: juvenal
